exercises.stem: Which is the superlative form of "bad"?
exercises.analysis: bad 的最高级是不规则变化 worst。bader 和 more bad 都是错误的，worse 是比较级。

exercises.stem: This bag is ___ heavy ___ that one.
exercises.analysis: 表示「和……一样」用 as...as 句型，中间用形容词原级。

exercises.stem: She is one of ___ students in our class.
exercises.analysis: one of the + 最高级 + 复数名词，最高级前面必须加 the。

exercises.stem: "He runs more fast than his brother." is correct.
exercises.analysis: fast 是单音节词，比较级是 faster，不是 more fast。多音节词才用 more + 原级。

segments: This is ___1___ (最好的) movie I have ever seen.
My English is not ___2___ (和……一样好) his.
exercises.analysis: 最高级 the best 前面加 the。同级比较 not as good as，中间用原级。

exercises.question: 请用正确的形式填空并说明理由：The weather is getting ___ (bad).
exercises.referenceAnswer: The weather is getting worse and worse. 理由：bad 的比较级是 worse，「越来越糟」用比较级 + and + 比较级句型。
